title: Lord of the Sealed Realm
content:
Lord of the Sealed Realm
 is the sole cultivator to have attained the 3rd step in the Cave world with 2 Essences, before Wang Lin did so with six.

He is the creator of the Stop Spell. Sovereign used 94 Seven-Colored God Void Nail to kill him; however his soul lingered on inside a treasure which itself was sealed inside the Heaven Defying Bead. His cultivation was at the very minimum within the later stages of Arcane Void.

When Wang Lin returns to the Cave World after becoming the strongest being in the Immortal Astral Continent, he gives him a pill that is implied to be able to restore his cultivation base and allow him to return to the Immortal Astral Continent from where he was born.
